creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Without modification 

--- execinfo.o ---
--- objwarn ---
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /home/eitan/svn/fbsd/more/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/libexecinfo-1.1
--- execinfo.o ---
cc  -O2 -pipe -march=corei7-avx  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -march=corei7-avx  -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector   -Qunused-arguments -c execinfo.c -o execinf$
.o
--- stacktraverse.So ---
cc -fpic -DPIC  -O2 -pipe -march=corei7-avx  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -march=corei7-avx  -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector   -Qunused-arguments -c stacktrav$
rse.c -o stacktraverse.So
--- execinfo.So ---
cc -fpic -DPIC  -O2 -pipe -march=corei7-avx  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -march=corei7-avx  -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector   -Qunused-arguments -c execinfo.$
 -o execinfo.So
--- stacktraverse.o ---
cc  -O2 -pipe -march=corei7-avx  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -march=corei7-avx  -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector   -Qunused-arguments -c stacktraverse.c -o sta
cktraverse.o
--- libexecinfo.a ---
building static execinfo library
--- libexecinfo.so.1 ---
building shared library libexecinfo.so.1
--- libexecinfo.a ---
ranlib -D libexecinfo.a
